title: remaining jc skills audit claim opened
body: Opened claim 4aa64a3d-45ef-4d22-a1a5-06aefe954fc8 after live claims returned empty. Scope: remaining unreviewed jc-* canonical skill sources plus generated .agents/.claude adapters and required continuity/collaboration surfaces. Existing P0.QG and monitor dirty files are present; I will keep them out of this skill-audit slice unless shared-state lifecycle updates require narrow coordination.
